title: sesbania coccinea subsp. atollensis
intro: Sesbania coccinea subsp. atollensis, also known as the Atoll Sesbania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as the potential to lower blood pressure and improve liver function. Sesbania coccinea subsp. atollensis is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine in some Pacific Island cultures.
